Html:
My guru Joe Stanger's C# version bug fix for shopping cart  applies also for the VB version I posted. 

Change the "Item Total" template as follows to display the cents digits when choosing an item with a rounded dollar price.

It concerns a small correctiion in the .aspx file.

<ItemTemplate>
         <%# (Convert.ToDouble(Eval("Quantity")) * Convert.ToDouble(Eval("UnitCost"))).ToString("N2")%>
</ItemTemplate>

Thanx Joe.

Hello Joe.

Can you tell me which .aspx file this gets changed in?

Thanks,
Tony
